value.found_quote:
Set up logging
Learn how to set up Cloud Logging for your agents deployed on Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly mentions a "Set up logging" guide that describes how to set up Cloud Logging for agents deployed on Agent Platform, which directly substantiates the claim of a Cloud Logging integration for capturing agent run logs. The page is marked as "Preview" (Pre-GA), indicating this feature is in preview/beta stage.
